title: The Foreign Duck, the Native Duck and God in a Coin Locker
original_title: アヒルと鴨のコインロッカー
overview: A university student finds himself wrapped up in the bizarre world of his next door neighbor, learning about his history and relationship with a girl who changed his life.

trailers.title: The Foreign Duck, The Native Duck and God in a Coin Locker (Yoshihiro Nakamura - Japan, 2007)
